title: Distillation.
content:
They that eat the uncrushed grape
    Walk with steady heels:
    Lo, now, how they stare and gape
    Where the poet reels!
    He has drunk the sheer divine
    Concentration of the vine.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Bliss Carman (William), titled "Distillation.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
